title: 23andMe patient-data-research flywheel
summary: Wojcicki's consumer genomics as a reinforcing loop: individual curiosity drives patient participation, which grows the research database, which produces discoveries that attract more participants — coordinating personal genetics, medical research, and patient agency.
source: Ch04 — "Anne Wojcicki: When Patients Coordinate with Data"

nodes.label: Patient Participation
nodes.description: Opt-in customers contributing genotype and phenotype data

nodes.label: Research Discovery
nodes.description: Novel variants for Parkinson's, depression, IBD, PGx

nodes.label: Health Intelligence
nodes.description: Actionable insight returned to individuals and clinicians

identifiability_note: Self-selection into 23andMe is correlated with health curiosity and demographics, so the participation→discovery→participation loop cannot be cleanly estimated without external controls.
